[xule.ruleDebug] Processing: DQC.US.0146.9870 - 11:46:50.093325 - D:\DJT\Documents\GitHub\davidtauriello\dqc_us_rules\tests\input\testfiles\2024-roll-2025\BTCW_instance_2024_2025.xml

[xule.ruleDebug] D:\DJT\Documents\GitHub\davidtauriello\dqc_us_rules\tests\input\testfiles\2024-roll-2025\BTCW_instance_2024_2025.xml - D:\DJT\Documents\GitHub\davidtauriello\dqc_us_rules\tests\input\testfiles\2024-roll-2025\BTCW_instance_2024_2025.xml

[DQC.US.0146.9870] The company has reported a 10K but the majority of the values reported on the Income Statement are for a period other than a year. The document period for the report starts on 2024-01-01 and ends on 2024-12-31. Facts reported for this duration were 11 and the total for non years were 22. Please check that the values used on the Income Statement represent a full year for the required reporting period.
Facts with values not reported for a year are as follows: 196,769 | 110,040,724 | -290,625 | None | 290,625 | None | 110,202,871 | 127,561,373 | -34,622 | 75,748 | 196,769 | None | 196,769 | 110,237,493 | None | -196,769 | 128,475,984 | 1,170,266 | 128,766,609 | 366,373 | -34,970 | 366,373
Facts with values reported for a year are as follows: None | -34,970 | 1,170,266 | 366,373 | 127,561,373 | 128,766,609 | 128,475,984 | 290,625 | 366,373 | 75,748 | -290,625
If this is a transition report use the DocumentTransitionReport element. If this is a successor company then ensure the element FinancialDesignationPredecessorAndSuccessorFixedList has been tagged. If this is the Year of Inception then define an extension element called YearOfInception with a nil value to indicate this fact.
Rule Element Id:9870 Rule version: 29.0.2 - BTCW_instance_2024_2025.xml 556
